languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровский полк{/g} сумел оттеснить ксеносов к их логову в руинах, но битва за них была проиграна. Внутри все кишит когтистыми чудовищами, и возглавляет их некое существо, способное мгновенно восстанавливать себе подобных. При том они больше не пытаются покинуть свою богопротивную гробницу... по крайней мере, пока. Сейчас были предложены три стратегии: создание запретной зоны вокруг гробницы, подрыв руин изнутри или натравливание Погонщиц на логово ксеносов".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, {n}{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровский полк{/g} сумел оттеснить ксеносов к их логову в руинах, но битва за них была проиграна. Внутри все кишит когтистыми чудовищами, и возглавляет их некое существо, способное мгновенно восстанавливать себе подобных. При том они больше не пытаются покинуть свою богопротивную гробницу... по крайней мере, пока. Сейчас были предложены три стратегии: создание запретной зоны вокруг гробницы, подрыв руин изнутри или натравливание Погонщиц на логово ксеносов".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} managed to push the xenos back to their lair in the ruins, but the battle for the ruins themselves was lost. Inside is teeming with clawed monsters, and they are led by a creature that can instantly regenerate others like it. However, they are no longer attempting to leave their unholy tomb... at least, not at the moment. Three strategies have now been proposed: creating an exclusion zone around the tomb, blowing up the ruins from within, or setting the Drovers on the xenos lair."

languages.text: 「隊長、{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}メロウ連隊{/g}は異星生物を遺跡の巣窟に追い詰めましたが、遺跡そのものの戦いは敗北しました。遺跡内には爪を持つ怪物が溢れ、その首領は同類を瞬時に再生させる能力を持つ存在です。しかし、彼らはもはや不浄の墓から出てこないようです…少なくとも、現時点では。3つの戦略が提案されました。墓の周囲に排除区域を作る、遺跡内部から爆破する、あるいはドルーバーを異星生物の巣窟に放つ」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} managed to push the xenos back to their lair in the ruins, but the battle for the ruins themselves was lost. Inside is teeming with clawed monsters, and they are led by a creature that can instantly regenerate others like it. However, they are no longer attempting to leave their unholy tomb... at least, not at the moment. Three strategies have now been proposed: creating an exclusion zone around the tomb, blowing up the ruins from within, or setting the Drovers on the xenos lair."

traits.locale_text: 「隊長、メロウ連隊は異星生物を遺跡の巣窟に追い詰めましたが、遺跡そのものの戦いは敗北しました。遺跡内には爪を持つ怪物が溢れ、その首領は同類を瞬時に再生させる能力を持つ存在です。しかし、彼らはもはや不浄の墓から出てこないようです…少なくとも、現時点では。3つの戦略が提案されました。墓の周囲に排除区域を作る、遺跡内部から爆破する、あるいはドルーバーを異星生物の巣窟に放つ。」

「隊長、{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}メロウ連隊{/g}は異星生物を遺跡の巣窟に追い詰めましたが、遺跡そのものの戦いは敗北しました。遺跡内には爪を持つ怪物が溢れ、その首領は同類を瞬時に再生させる能力を持つ存在です。しかし、彼らはもはや不浄の墓から出てこないようです…少なくとも、現時点では。3つの戦略が提案されました。墓の周囲に排除区域を作る、遺跡内部から爆破する、あるいはドルーバーを異星生物の巣窟に放つ」

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, el {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regimiento de Merov{/g} logró hacer que los xenos retrocedieran a su guarida de las ruinas, pero la batalla por las propias ruinas terminó en derrota. El interior está lleno de monstruos con garras, liderados por una criatura que puede regenerar a las demás. Sin embargo, ya no intentan salir de la tumba... por lo menos, por ahora. Hay tres propuestas para resolver la situación: crear una zona de exclusión en torno a la tumba, volar las ruinas desde el interior o enviar a los Pastores contra la guarida de los xenos».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} managed to push the xenos back to their lair in the ruins, but the battle for the ruins themselves was lost. Inside is teeming with clawed monsters, and they are led by a creature that can instantly regenerate others like it. However, they are no longer attempting to leave their unholy tomb... at least, not at the moment. Three strategies have now been proposed: creating an exclusion zone around the tomb, blowing up the ruins from within, or setting the Drovers on the xenos lair."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, el {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regimiento de Merov{/g} logró hacer que los xenos retrocedieran a su guarida de las ruinas, pero la batalla por las propias ruinas terminó en derrota. El interior está lleno de monstruos con garras, liderados por una criatura que puede regenerar a las demás. Sin embargo, ya no intentan salir de la tumba... por lo menos, por ahora. Hay tres propuestas para resolver la situación: crear una zona de exclusión en torno a la tumba, volar las ruinas desde el interior o enviar a los Pastores contra la guarida de los xenos».

languages.text: “舰长大人，{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫军团{/g}已将异形逼退至巢穴遗迹，但未能攻下遗迹本身。里面盘踞着大量利爪怪物，并有一种能瞬间复活其同类的生物统率。不过，它们目前已不再试图离开那座亵渎之墓……至少暂时如此。现提出三套后续策略：在墓穴周围建立隔离区；从内部爆破遗迹；或是驱使拒生花进攻异形巢穴。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} managed to push the xenos back to their lair in the ruins, but the battle for the ruins themselves was lost. Inside is teeming with clawed monsters, and they are led by a creature that can instantly regenerate others like it. However, they are no longer attempting to leave their unholy tomb... at least, not at the moment. Three strategies have now been proposed: creating an exclusion zone around the tomb, blowing up the ruins from within, or setting the Drovers on the xenos lair."

languages.text: "Lord Captain, das {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov-Regiment{/g} konnte die Xenos zu ihrem Versteck in den Ruinen zurückdrängen, aber der Kampf um die Ruinen selbst ging verloren. In ihrem Inneren wimmelt es von klauenbewehrten Monstern, die von einer Kreatur angeführt werden, die ihre Artgenossen blitzschnell regenerieren kann. Immerhin versuchen sie nicht mehr, ihr unheiliges Grab zu verlassen ... im Moment jedenfalls. Wir haben also drei Möglichkeiten: Wir erklären die Umgebung um das Grab zum Sperrgebiet, sprengen die Ruinen von innen oder hetzen die Treiber auf das Versteck der Xenos."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} managed to push the xenos back to their lair in the ruins, but the battle for the ruins themselves was lost. languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Alayı{/g}, zenoları harabelerdeki inlerine geri püskürtmeyi başardı ancak harabelerin kendisi için yapılan savaş kaybedildi Lord Kaptan. İçerisi pençeli canavarlarla kaynıyor ve kendisi gibileri anında yeniden oluşturabilen bir yaratık tarafından yönetiliyorlar. Ancak artık kutsal olmayan mezarlarını terk etmeye çalışmıyorlar... En azından şu anda. Üç strateji önerildi: Mezarın etrafında bir yasak bölge oluşturmak, harabeleri içeriden havaya uçurmak veya Çobanları zeno inine salmak."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} managed to push the xenos back to their lair in the ruins, but the battle for the ruins themselves was lost. Inside is teeming with clawed monsters, and they are led by a creature that can instantly regenerate others like it. traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Alayı{/g}, zenoları harabelerdeki inlerine geri püskürtmeyi başardı ancak harabelerin kendisi için yapılan savaş kaybedildi Lord Kaptan. İçerisi pençeli canavarlarla kaynıyor ve kendisi gibileri anında yeniden oluşturabilen bir yaratık tarafından yönetiliyorlar. Ancak artık kutsal olmayan mezarlarını terk etmeye çalışmıyorlar... En azından şu anda. Üç strateji önerildi: Mezarın etrafında bir yasak bölge oluşturmak, harabeleri içeriden havaya uçurmak veya Çobanları zeno inine salmak."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, le {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}régiment de Merov{/g} a réussi à repousser les xénos dans les ruines qui leur servent de repaire. Malheureusement, elles n'ont pas pu être prises. L'intérieur grouille de monstres griffus menés par une créature capable de régénérer ses semblables instantanément. Cependant, ils ne tentent plus de quitter leur tombeau impie... du moins, pas pour le moment. Trois stratégies s'offrent à nous : créer une zone d'exclusion autour du tombeau, faire exploser les ruines de l'intérieur ou lâcher les Chasseurs sur le repaire xénos. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} managed to push the xenos back to their lair in the ruins, but the battle for the ruins themselves was lost.
